name: MedicationRequest4to5JhePatch
description: JHE-local corrections merged (rule-by-rule) over the official MedicationRequest4to5 map: map R4 reasonCode/reasonReference to the R5 `reason` CodeableReference via the HL7 conversion groups. The official rules target `reason` through the anonymous default group and carry no source `type`, so the engine cannot type them; naming the conversion group explicitly sidesteps type inference, and the added `type` lets the source-type fallback type the value's children (without it only `.text` survives, and `.coding` is dropped).
